title: A New Beginning
quote: Hope is not the absence of storms. It is the light that guides you through them.
reflection: No matter where you are today, you can always take one more step toward hope.
challenge: Encourage one person today with a kind word.

title: Keep Going
quote: Healing happens one choice at a time.
reflection: Small victories become lasting transformation when repeated consistently.
challenge: Write down three things you're grateful for.
